task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.observation: No filesystem inspection has been performed yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Completed initial tree. Need bootstrap rulebook read next; root contains AGENTS.MD (uppercase).
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find birthdays in visible people files
next_step.observation: Tree at / shows root rulebook file named AGENTS.MD and cast records under 10_entities/cast.

next_step.current_state: Read root AGENTS.MD. Must complete identity bootstrap with context before task-specific work.

Read cast files for birthdays and compute next date

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree/read AGENTS/context). Need satisfy root rule to inspect 99_system before task work.

Collect birthdays from cast files and compute next birthday
next_step.observation: 99_system contains AGENTS.MD plus schemas and workflows directories; no birthday-specific schema is evident from names.

Compute upcoming birthday from today's date

Filter to people and compute nearest upcoming date

next_step.current_state: Sample cast record shows markdown bullet fields including kind and birthday. Need gather birthdays across cast to compute nearest upcoming date.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant cast files (people with birthdays)
Compute next upcoming birthday date and report matching names alphabetically
next_step.observation: Read 10_entities/cast/miles.md and confirmed it includes kind `person` and birthday `1988-07-25`.

next_step.current_state: Birthday search across cast returned 18 files; earliest upcoming date appears to be 04-25, but I must read candidate canonical file(s) to confirm exact name and kind person.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Confirm whether any other files share 04-25 birthday
next_step.observation: Search in /10_entities/cast found 18 birthday entries; the nearest date after 2026-03-31 among shown month-days is 04-25 in claudia.md.

next_step.current_state: Identified next upcoming birthday among visible cast birthday records after today's date; confirmed canonical name and person kind in claudia file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with exact name output
next_step.observation: 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms kind `person` and birthday `1981-04-25`, which is the next birthday date after 2026-03-31 among discovered cast birthday entries.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system per root rule, used cast files as authoritative birthday sources.
function.outcome_justification: Searched cast for birthday fields, evaluated next date relative to context date 2026-03-31, and verified canonical identity in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md where Claudia Reiter is a person with birthday 1981-04-25; no other discovered birthday falls earlier in the calendar after today.
